features.name: Decree by the Jade Hand
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.tier1: 11 holy damage; slide 2; P < 4 the target is hexed (save ends)
effects.tier2: 17 holy damage; slide 5; P < 5 the target is hexed (save ends)
effects.tier3: 21 holy damage; slide 8; P < 6 the target is hexed (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A hexed target glows green, and each of their heroic abilities has its cost increased by 2.
The potency increases by 1. Additionally, the ground beneath the area drops 3 squares and is difficult terrain. Each flying target who has M < 5 is knocked prone.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target is grabbed, Daron can choose to keep the vine extended, pull the target adjacent to him, or pull himself adjacent to the target. The vine stays attached to a grabbed target until it takes damage from a strike, the target escapes the grab, or Daron causes the vine to release the target (no action required).

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: This ability can be replaced with the features of a different treasure Daron has acquired.
